title: PokeParadise Official Modpack
description: The official modpack for the PokeParadise cobblemon server.
body:
The official PokeParadise modpack to play on the whitelisted server. We're using different addons to add to the base Cobblemon experience.

We created PokeParadise to provide a comfortable shared Cobblemon experience for all players that join our server. We aim to reward effort spent on this server with events like tournaments, minigames, and various Minecraft or Pokemon related activities. Feedback is encouraged! We plan to flesh out this server with suggested mods and tweaks from you all so we can collectively forge something great!

This server is new, we are actively working on spawn, plans for champion/gym leader/elite four roles, events (legendaries, tournaments, minigames exc.), and general server quality of life and vision. Hopefully, with everyone's help and collaboration, we can create something that we can all enjoy!

Link to discord server: https://discord.gg/AQDPBxMvp7
